debug_info.goal:
a b : ℝ
ha : 0 < a
hb : 0 < b
this : 0 ∉ uIcc a b
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in a..b, 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2 = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b

proof:
refine (integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (f := fun y => log y - 1 / y) ?_ ?_).trans ?_
  · intro x hx
    have hx' : x ≠ 0 := fun h => this (h ▸ hx)
    simpa [hx', one_div, sq] using (hasDerivAt_log hx').sub (hasDerivAt_inv hx')
  · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
    apply ContinuousOn.add
    · exact continuousOn_const.div continuousOn_id (fun x hx h => this (h ▸ hx))
    · exact continuousOn_const.div (continuousOn_id.pow 2) (fun x hx h => this (pow_eq_zero h ▸ hx))
  · ring
successful_attempts:
refine (integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt (f := fun y => log y - 1 / y) ?_ ?_).trans ?_
  · intro x hx
    have hx' : x ≠ 0 := fun h => this (h ▸ hx)
    simpa [hx', one_div, sq] using (hasDerivAt_log hx').sub (hasDerivAt_inv hx')
  · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
    apply ContinuousOn.add
    · exact continuousOn_const.div continuousOn_id (fun x hx h => this (h ▸ hx))
    · exact continuousOn_const.div (continuousOn_id.pow 2) (fun x hx h => this (pow_eq_zero h ▸ hx))
  · ring
